base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_dungeon_bombable_wall — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Cracked/bombable wall — looks identical to regular until bombed. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cracked/bombable wall — looks identical to regular until bombed; leads to secret rooms
